user_system_path: Deterministic execution now starts from FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml. The first ACTIVE task is Mock Evidence: create the Marcus approved the estimate fixture.
no_routing_contract: The Agent is forbidden from asking 'What is next?' or 'Should we audit this?'. The Agent must read FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml, identify the first ACTIVE task, and execute it. If the task is completed, the Agent marks it COMPLETED, moves the next item to ACTIVE, and immediately begins the next task. The Agent may not deviate from the queue without a signed-off QUEUE_UPDATE commit from Brandon.
allowed_files_raw: Current routing change only: create FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml and update .foldera-contract.json with the no-routing deterministic execution law. Subsequent work is controlled by the first ACTIVE queue item allowed_files.
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/provider/schema/Supabase/Vercel/live Slack/PR #142/Stripe/auth/landing/dashboard work, no package/dependency changes, no data mutation, no migrations, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup.
required_browser_proof: Not applicable; deterministic TEST_MODE fixture proof only.
acceptance_condition: FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml exists, contains 20-30 granular build steps for the Holy Crap MVP loop, and item 001 is ACTIVE. .foldera-contract.json contains the no-routing contract. No product/runtime implementation starts in this change.
stop_condition: Stop when FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml exists, .foldera-contract.json is updated with the no-routing contract, and the first task is marked ACTIVE.
browser_proof_command: not applicable - deterministic TEST_MODE fixture proof only
anti_regression_checks: Exactly one queue item is ACTIVE
The first ACTIVE queue item is id 001
The queue contains no audit or hygiene tasks
The first five queue items are Mock Evidence, State Inference, Card Generation, State Mutation, and Receipt Generation
No product/runtime implementation starts in the queue creation change
next_command: Read FOLDERA_EXECUTION_QUEUE.yaml, execute the first ACTIVE task, and do not ask what is next.
